images.prompt: A raw, ultra-realistic 8k photograph of a stunningly beautiful, young Japanese idol with flawless, pore-textured skin, captured in an abandoned factory transformed into a moody underground Live House setting. She is dressed in a snug, form-fitting white cotton tee that clings to her ample chest and curvaceous figure, tucked into vintage-washed straight-leg jeans that accentuate her slim waist. The scene is bathed in vibrant, high-saturation colors, with bright, clear dappled sunlight filtering through unseen leaves, casting artistic, leaf-shaped light spots across her face and the textured concrete walls, creating a lively yet melancholic atmosphere. The camera features a hyper-close-up focus on her luscious, glossy lips, caught in a candid, natural belly laugh that exudes deep, soulful emotion. She holds a lit cigarette artistically between her fingers, the wisps of smoke swirling in the sharp light. Shot on Sony A7R IV, 85mm f/1.4 GM lens, with shallow depth of field, ray tracing, global illumination, and cinematic bokeh that blurs the background while keeping her radiant expression in razor-sharp focus.8k photo, Large breasts, deep cleavage, ample cleavage, sexy photo, beautilful girl without makeup
